props.text: Two-front day — Trump's 'hostilities have terminated' War Powers letter resolves Polymarket's end-mil-ops-Iran market YES while Senate-ban / Gemini-DCO regulatory plumbing keeps consolidating Kalshi+Polymarket's incumbents-with-rules positioning. Path C, no engagement counts.

props.author: KristenhCNN
props.text: Trump's formal letter to Speaker Johnson + Senate Pro Tem Grassley argues the Iran war 'hostilities,' begun with the Feb 28 strikes, 'have terminated.' Most upstream primary on the War Powers Act T+60 — directly resolves Polymarket's end-mil-ops market window.

props.author: IranIntl_En
props.text: White House principal deputy press sec confirms 'active conversations' with Congress as the 60-day War Powers Resolution deadline approaches. Posted ~24h before the Trump letter — pre-positions the resolution-debate spike that comments-side reply-maker should pick up next 48h.

props.author: Polymarket
props.text: Polymarket's flat-out endorsement of the Senate self-ban: 'Our Rulebook & ToS already prohibit such conduct, but codifying this into law is a step forward for the industry.' Completes both incumbents publicly endorsing the rule rather than treating it as a threat.

props.author: BitcoinNews
props.text: Gemini receives DCO license from CFTC per @cameron, after Dec DCM approval. Olympus + Titan = full-stack venue + clearinghouse for predictions, futures, and options. Third regulated US prediction-market entrant — compresses Kalshi's offshore-perception advantage over Polymarket.

props.author: businessline
props.text: Most exit-poll surveys give MK Stalin's DMK-led alliance a clear majority in the 234-member Assembly. Anchors the consensus narrative going into 05-03 (T-1) and 05-04 resolution morning — confirms memory's DMK 87.5% / TVK cooled to 6.95c frame is still live.
